description: Golden retrieval set for the grounded Rules Q&A feature. Each case maps a real rules question to the LRR rule_id(s) that actually answer it (verified against core/data/source/lrr/lrr_rules.json). Used by the Tier A retrieval eval (recall@k / MRR, deterministic, free, in CI) and, later, as the single question source the Tier B promptfoo answer evals consume. Seeded from the demo rules chips, sample_rules_questions.json, and community-classic questions. Expected ids are the canonical answering rule(s); recall@k credits a hit when any expected id is in the top k.

cases.question: What happens if two players have abilities that trigger at the same timing window?
